_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Track data compliance remediation activities, including milestone monitoring, blocker escalation, and closure verification with evidence.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-007 (RM, cosine: 0.445), DQ-A-002 (DQ, cosine: 0.439).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.553). Shared vocabulary: [remediation]. DCWF-only terms [actions, develop] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, blocker, closure, compliance, data, escalation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.905 (P=0.944, R=0.869). P exceeds R by 0.075 — the DCWF element's 3 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 15 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Develop remediation actions." and "Track data compliance remediation activities, including milestone monitoring, bl" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.450 < STS 0.553 (gap -0.103). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [actions, develop] and [activities, blocker, closure] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.9%. Shared tokens: [remediation]. DCWF-only: [actions, develop]. WIDAI-only: [activities, blocker, closure, compliance, data, escalation].
